SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, HELENA SERVED SEP-07-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, YI
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, HELENA COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-06-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 03 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT. 3, JUDGE J.ORR, CSR CARLITO MANDIA, CLERK E.MONTI COMPLT FILED: 9-3-93 12:00 PM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. DEFT COUNSEL, FRANCIS FAHY CHALLENGED JUDGE ORR 170.6CCP & MOTION WAS HEARD AND DENIED BY JUDGE DONALDSON. BOTH PLTF & DEFT PRESENT WITH COUNSEL. LAWRENCE EISENBERG FOR THE PLTF. BOTH PARTIES HAVE STIPU- LATED TO AN ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PLTF TO HAVE REST & POSS OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 825 SANTIAGO, STAYED TO 12-19-93, 4PM. IF DEFT VACATES, ALL RENT/DAMAGES TO BE WAIVED AND PLTF TO FILE DISMISSAL W/PREJ. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE, RENT/DAMAGES ARE $3700.00, COSTS PER COST BILL & WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH. PLTF COUNSEL TO PREPARE THE ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.
ORDER RE: COURT TRIAL OF DEC. 6, 1993 SIGNED BY JUDGE JOSEPH ORR.
